skill1.kitLine: Affects self when killing an enemy.
skill1.note: Kill-gated trigger; scope-lock raid boss never dies mid-fight so this can never fire. Sanctioned skip.
Effect payload of the kill-gated trigger above. Prior materialized override incorrectly modeled this as a passive permanent +12.6% ATK; that was removed. Correctly unmodeled vs partless boss.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects all allies.
skill2.note: fullBurstEnter counts team FB entries regardless of who bursted — faithful to 'entering Full Burst' text.

skill2.kitLine: Effects vary according to the number of times entered. Each subsequent effect triggers all effects before it:
skill2.note: Engine escalating semantics: Nth activation applies steps 1..N capped at steps.length. Exactly matches the descriptor.

skill2.kitLine: Once: Cooldown of Burst Skill ▼ 2.34 sec.
Twice: Cooldown of Burst Skill ▼ 2.7 sec.
Three times: Cooldown of Burst Skill ▼ 3.17 sec.
skill2.note: From 3rd FB on, every FB refunds 2.34+2.7+3.17 = 8.21s of every ally's burst CD.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when using Burst Skill. Affects all allies.
skill2.note: burstCast fires ONLY on rotations she personally bursts — faithful to 'when using Burst Skill'.

skill2.kitLine: Effects vary according to the number of uses. Each subsequent effect triggers all effects before it:
skill2.note: Engine gives each escalating step a distinct buff key (key:sN), so all three steps coexist and sum from 3rd cast.

skill2.where: skill2[1] escalating step[0] buff critDamagePct 10.77 dur 5
skill2[1] escalating step[1] buff critDamagePct 12.46 dur 5

skill2.kitLine: Three times: Critical Damage ▲ 14.42% for 5 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[1] escalating step[2] buff critDamagePct 14.42 dur 5
skill2.note: From 3rd burst cast, all three steps sum = +37.65% team crit damage for 5s.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: the kill-gated ATK ▲ 12.6% is unmodeled — it can never trigger against the raid boss (the boss does not die mid-fight)
documentedConfounds.why: Correctly sanctioned skip. The trigger condition (enemy killed) is impossible vs a partless raid boss. Zero damage impact in scope-lock.

documentedConfounds.text: cadence: fire rate / reload are unmeasured estimates (engine SMG default 20 pulls/s shipped; the raw datamine says 24 pulls/s, and reload_start_ammo 119 hints at rolling reload) — verify on a focus video
documentedConfounds.why: Fire rate was resolved to 24/s per note (owner decision 2026-07-17, datamine rate_of_fire 1440 rpm authoritative). BUT reloadFrames 111 vs datamine reload_time 150 (~90f) and possible rolling reload (reload_start_ammo 119) remain open. Reload timing directly affects personal DPS (downtime per mag cycle). Caveat text is slightly stale re: fire rate but the reload question is live.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2/burst: escalating tiers reach full value only from her 3rd Full Burst / 3rd burst cast, and every modeled effect is burst-gated — the whole kit is inert in a team that cannot chain Full Bursts
documentedConfounds.why: This is a correct property of the kit and its modeling, not a modeling error. The escalating semantics are faithfully encoded; the caveat documents a team-comp dependency (no FB chain → no value). A /sim-battery diff is the real check per the note.

documentedConfounds.text: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model). Every ⚑ is an UNMEASURED estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number.
documentedConfounds.why: The entire override is flagged as unvalidated hypothesis. No board data exists (board: null, no graded teams). All numbers are datamine-derived but unverified against gameplay.

authorIntentSummary: The override models Volume as a rotation-accelerator + crit-support: S2 block A gives team-wide escalating burst CDR on Full Burst entry (fullBurstEnter, steps [2.34, 2.7, 3.17]s), S2 block B gives team-wide escalating crit-damage buffs on her own burst cast (burstCast, steps [10.77, 12.46, 14.42]% for 5s), and burst gives a flat team crit-rate buff (31.9% for 5s). S1 (kill-gated ATK self-buff) is deliberately unmodeled because the raid boss never dies. The whole file is flagged PARSER BASELINE / HYPOTHESIS — fire rate was resolved to 24/s but reloadFrames (111 vs ~90) and possible rolling reload remain open measurement items, and no board/graded data exists to validate any number.
